/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/archive_debug.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/archive_debug.dir/debug/archive_debug.cc.o -o archive_debug  -Wl,-rpath,/media/unknown/WDBlue1/FDIA/libafflib_ext/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu libarchive.a libimgformatlib.a libewf_ext/lib/libewf.a -lraptor2 -lz -lspdlog -lfmt -luriparser -luuid /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbz2.so libafflib_ext/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libafflib.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsnappy.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblz4.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librocksdb.so libblake3.a
